translation: Woe to those who defraud!

arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكۡتَالُواْ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسۡتَوۡفُونَ
transliteration: Allatheena itha iktaloo AAala alnnasi yastawfoona
translation: Those who, when they take anything by measure from others, take it in full,
And who, when they measure or weigh things to give to others, give fraudulently less.
Do they not think they will be raised to life again, after death,
For a great Day?
The Day when mankind shall stand before the Lord of the worlds!

arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَٰبَ ٱلۡفُجَّارِ لَفِي سِجِّينٖ
transliteration: Kalla inna kitaba alfujjari lafee sijjeenin
translation: No indeed! [Mankind shall not be left unjudged.] The record of the the wicked persons is in Sijjeen .
notes: See the next two Verses 8 and 9 for the Qur’aanic explanation.

translation: And what do you understand what Sijjeen is?
It is a written record!
notes: And the fate of those whose record it is, is sealed. See the next Verse 10.

translation: Woe that Day to those who had denied the Truth!
Those who had denied the Day of Judgement.

arabic: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعۡتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
transliteration: Wama yukaththibu bihi illa kullu muAAtadin atheemin
translation: None but those transgressing with criminal intent deny it.

arabic: إِذَا تُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡهِ ءَايَٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
transliteration: Itha tutla AAalayhi ayatuna qala asateeru alawwaleena
translation: When Our Verses are recited to them, they say, “Fables of the ancient peoples!”

arabic: كَلَّاۖ بَلۡۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُواْ يَكۡسِبُونَ
transliteration: Kalla bal rana AAala quloobihim ma kanoo yaksiboona
translation: No! On the contrary, what they have been earning with their own deeds has made their minds dirty.

arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمۡ عَن رَّبِّهِمۡ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لَّمَحۡجُوبُونَ
transliteration: Kalla innahum AAan rabbihim yawmaithin lamahjooboona
translation: No indeed! On that day they shall certainly be shut out from the presence of their Lord.
And then they shall indeed suffer the blazing Fire of Hell!

arabic: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
transliteration: Thumma yuqalu hatha allathee kuntum bihi tukaththiboona
translation: And then they will be told, “This is what you had been denying!”

arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَٰبَ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارِ لَفِي عِلِّيِّينَ
transliteration: Kalla inna kitaba alabrari lafee AAilliyyeena
translation: But the record of the righteous peope is in Illiyyeen.
And what do you understand what Illiyyoon is?
It is a written record!
Those closest to Allah are witnesses thereto.
The righteous people will indeed be in bliss.
[From their seats] on couches, they will look around them.
In their faces you shall recognise the glow of bliss.
They will be given to drink of sealed nectar,

arabic: خِتَٰمُهُۥ مِسۡكٞۚ وَفِي ذَٰلِكَ فَلۡيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلۡمُتَنَٰفِسُونَ
transliteration: Khitamuhu miskun wafee thalika falyatanafasi almutanafisoona
translation: Sealed with [fragrance of] musk. And for that let the aspirants aspire.
And it will be a blend with [the waters of] Tasneem,
A fountain from which those who are closest to Allah will drink.

arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجۡرَمُواْ كَانُواْ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ يَضۡحَكُونَ
transliteration: Inna allatheena ajramoo kanoo mina allatheena amanoo yadhakoona
translation: Indeed those who do sinful acts laugh at the believers.
And they [mischievously] wink at one another as they pass by them.

arabic: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓاْ إِلَىٰٓ أَهۡلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُواْ فَكِهِينَ
transliteration: Waitha inqalaboo ila ahlihimu inqalaboo fakiheena
translation: And when they go back to people of their own kind, they go back cracking jokes about them (believers).

arabic: وَإِذَا رَأَوۡهُمۡ قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ
transliteration: Waitha raawhum qaloo inna haolai ladalloona
translation: And when they see them [their own people], they tell them, “These people [believers] have indeed gone astray!”
And they [non-believers] are not sent as guardians over them [believers].
notes: The non-believers are thus told that they need not worry about the believers going astray.

arabic: فَٱلۡيَوۡمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنَ ٱلۡكُفَّارِ يَضۡحَكُونَ
transliteration: Faalyawma allatheena amanoo mina alkuffari yadhakoona
translation: This Day [of Judgement] then the believers will laugh at those that had been suppressing the Truth,
As they [believers] look around them [seated comfortably] upon their couches [and ruminate,]

arabic: هَلۡ ثُوِّبَ ٱلۡكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُواْ يَفۡعَلُونَ
transliteration: Hal thuwwiba alkuffaru ma kanoo yafAAaloona
translation: “Are not the suppressors of Truth duly requited for what they used to do?”
